get.description: Paginated list of bookings assigned to the nurse.
Get all sessions for a specific date.

post.description: Verifies the 6-digit OTP from the patient to start the session.
Completes a started session. If all sessions are done, booking completes and nurse gets paid.
Nurse cancels booking. User gets full refund for remaining sessions. Nurse receives cancellation strike.

get.description: Returns wallet balance and paginated transaction/payout history.

post.description: Nurse requests withdrawal of earnings to bank account. Minimum ₹100.

get.description: Paginated list of nurse withdrawal requests.

get.summary: List available care requests for nurse
get.description: Get a list of active care requests sent to the authenticated nurse.

post.summary: Place a bid on a care request
post.description: Nurse places a bid with their price on an available care request.

care_request_id.description: ID of the care request to bid on

notes.description: Optional proposal notes or specialties details

get.description: Nurse views details of a single care request they were notified about.
Get all past and active bids placed by the nurse.

aadhar_document.description: Aadhar document (jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, max 10MB)

pan_document.description: PAN document (jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, max 10MB)

marksheet_10_document.description: 10th marksheet document (jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, max 10MB)

marksheet_12_document.description: 12th marksheet document (jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, max 10MB)

nursing_certificate_document.description: Nursing certificate document (jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, max 10MB)

get.description: Returns a list of active support categories that users can select when creating a ticket.
Get a paginated list of support tickets for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new support ticket with subject, description, category, optional priority and attachments.

attachments[].description: Array of files (images, pdf, doc, docx)

get.description: Get full details of a specific ticket with all messages and attachment URLs.

post.description: Send a message to an existing ticket. Supports file attachments (images, pdf, doc, docx).

get.description: Get messages for a ticket. Pass `after` query parameter (ISO 8601 timestamp) to fetch only newer messages for efficient polling.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Only messages after this time will be returned.

post.description: Marks all admin messages on this ticket as read by the user.

get.description: Get a paginated list of bookings for the authenticated user.
Get details of a specific booking with sessions and nurse info.

post.summary: Select a bid and create booking
post.description: Selects a nurse bid to create a booking (pending payment).
Calculates wallet/gateway split. If wallet covers full amount, booking is confirmed immediately. Otherwise returns gateway order details for frontend.
Called after user completes payment on Razorpay/Stripe. Verifies signature, debits wallet portion, confirms booking, generates sessions.
Cancels booking with slab-based refund to wallet.

get.description: Generates a 6-digit OTP for today's session to share with the nurse.
Returns wallet balance and paginated transaction history.
Get a paginated list of care requests created by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new care request for a patient.

get.description: Get details of a specific care request.

put.description: Updates a care request. If matching, only notes/phone allowed. If failed, full edit allowed and matching restarts.

post.description: Cancels a care request and clears all nurse matching caches/bids.

get.summary: View bids on a care request
get.description: User views all active bids placed by nurses on their care request. Shows limited nurse info.

get.summary: View a single bid on a care request
get.description: User views details of a single bid. Shows limited nurse info plus experience.

post.summary: Submit a review and rating for a nurse after a booking

parameters.name: booking_id
parameters.description: The ID of the booking to review

get.description: Returns API health status

tags.name: Support Tickets
tags.description: API Endpoints for managing support tickets (For both Patients and Nurses)
